docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER KINGSWOOD CAPITAL PARTNERS LLC'S UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER NOR PROPOSED JUDGMENT RECEIVED. PETITIONER FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PETITITONER IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING, A PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
